content_style_descriptions.meeting: 会议、讨论、决策 / Meetings, discussions, decisions
content_style_descriptions.conversation: 对话、播客、访谈 / Conversations, podcasts, interviews
content_style_descriptions.lecture: 讲解、课程、科普 / Lectures, courses, explainers
content_style_descriptions.tutorial: 教程、操作指南 / Tutorials, how-to guides
content_style_descriptions.review: 评测、体验、对比 / Reviews, experiences, comparisons
content_style_descriptions.news: 资讯、时事、纪实 / News, current affairs, documentary

changes: 默认配图模型由 Doubao-Seedream-4.0 升级为 4.5（¥0.25/张，仍比 Gemini Pro 省 ~74%）：4.5 针对简体中文图文混排优化，文字更锐利、排版更专业，修复配图中文重叠/乱码
配图尺寸忽横忽竖的根因在 image-service（硬编码 size 档位）已修：现按 aspect_ratio 下发显式 WxH 锁定朝向
默认配图模型由 Gemini 3 Pro Image（¥0.96/张）切为字节 Doubao-Seedream-4.0（¥0.20/张，省 ~79%）；image-service 直连火山方舟 Ark 出图
全局切回开关=本处 image_model.model_id：回退保质量改 gemini-3-pro-image-preview、回退保成本改 gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview
max_tokens 统一放大至 12000（overview/key_points/action_items）：实测代理对 deepseek-chat 放行 16k 仍全额给，12k 毫无障碍；max_tokens 是上限非预付（按实际生成计费），为 reasoning_content 留足余量、彻底消除贴边截断/空返回风险
放大 model_params.max_tokens：overview 1500→4096、key_points 1200→2048、action_items 1000→2048
修复 overview 长摘要被截断（叙事中途断句）及自适应多图被抑制（后段 {{IMAGE:}} 锚点无法生成）的问题
风格体系由 11 收敛为 7（meeting/conversation/lecture/tutorial/review/news/general），互不重叠
弃用 podcast/interview/explainer/documentary/video，经 normalize_content_style 边界归一
全程自动识别：默认 summary_style 改为 auto，未选时后端识别为 7 规范风格之一
配图自适应多图、类型多样：max_images 3→6，overview-only 门控不变
提示词重构：通用模板 + jinja 按风格注入内核，去模板腔、提炼洞见
Added auto_images feature for AI-driven image generation in summaries
Image placeholders format: {{IMAGE: description}}
Supported for overview summary type across content styles
Maximum 3 images per summary with 60s timeout
Added 6 new content styles: interview, tutorial, review, news, explainer, documentary
Added styles_i18n.json for internationalized style metadata
Added GET /api/v1/summary-styles endpoint
Added quality-aware error tolerance guidance
Increased max_tokens for richer structured output (overview: 500→1500, key_points: 800→1200, action_items: 600→1000)
Added chapter-aware summary generation
Improved formatting with structured sections and tables
Enhanced style differentiation (meeting/lecture/podcast with distinct structures)
Added content_style support (meeting/lecture/podcast/video/general)
Different system roles for different content types
Improved context-aware prompts
Initial version with optimized prompts
Added clear distinction between key_points and action_items
Added examples and formatting requirements
